ChamaState.title: ChamaState
ChamaState.description: Represents the full-state ledger for the Merry-Go-Round and Capital Lending Chama.

members.description: Active registered Chama members details and balances.

cycles.description: Financial contribution cycles scheduled for the group.

loans.description: Approved and pending debt allocations with automated status checks.

mpesaTransactions.description: Safaricom C2B payment log used for fuzzy reconciliation.

bylaws.description: Established bylaws rules authorized by the Chairperson.

disputes.description: Bylaw violations and active member ledger disputes.

reminders.description: Outbound recipient alert and notification history log.

/system/chamaState.description: The master synchronizer document for active state tracking.
